dj_text: From Selvmord - Råbe Under Vand straight into Sleiman - Bomaye ft. Livid, MellemFingaMuzik! No pause button! Small but mighty. 5 more in the tank.
commercial_text: New from the makers of nothing — the SmartFridge X. It texts you when you're out of milk. It also texts your ex.
recovery_text: What the— who gave them our frequency?! That's the THIRD kosmos this week!
title: Sleiman - Bomaye ft. Livid, MellemFingaMuzik
